_note: Online (Limitless ladder + online tournaments) accept new sets on set_release_date. In-person majors are legal in_person_legal_date (= release + lag_days). Predictor uses these to filter labs/major data to the current format and to recency-weight late-format events. This file is auto-generated by backend/core/update_sets.py — but bootstrapped manually for the initial deployment so the frontend works before the next scraper run.
